  counts = Hash.new(0)
  points.each do |point|
    x, y = point
    counts[y] += 1

  sum_squares = 0

    total_sum += term
    sum_squares += term * term
    total_sum %= MOD
    sum_squares %= MOD
  end
  temp = (total_sum * total_sum - sum_squares) % MOD
  ans = (temp * inv_2) % MOD
  ans
end
